resources.string: Tappy learns more about you through the apps you use
Tappy only reads the data you allow, never reads your personal messages, and never shares it with third parties. You can disconnect at any time.
Connect your calendar so Tappy can suggest things that fit your schedule.
Event names, times, and locations for the next 7 days (read-only)
Connect your Zalo account so Tappy knows your name and profile picture.
Display name and Zalo profile picture (messages are never read)
What does Tappy do with this data?
Google Calendar → Tappy suggests places to eat near your meetings
Zalo → Shows your real name and photo on your review feed
In-app behavior → Tappy remembers what you like and when you\'re active
Connecting %1$s is launching soon. You can keep using Tappy normally for now.
